creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text: I see, it have more sense right now, but I fear it can break somethings in dependant ports, For example I maintain wazuh and it is compatible with 2.2.1 and they will use 2.3.0 (opensearch and opensearch-dashboards) soon. I see in theory 2.x updates will not break anything. Maybe the best is update opensearch to latest version and add only previous versions when it is neccesary. what do you think?
